utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes: health_coverage (present but missing mental health coverage details beyond an added cost; lacks coverage specifics), travel_coverage (present with provider, costs, some coverage amounts; reasonably specified), total_budget (present with monthly and annual totals). property_coverage is missing. additional_services is missing. Of the included ones, health_coverage is not fully specified per 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—it only lists provider and two costs without coverage details. travel_coverage is specified with costs and coverage limits. total_budget is specified. Fully specified items according to the format: travel_coverage and total_budget. So 2 out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists two providers: WellCare Essential for health coverage and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel coverage. I looked for these exact items in the ground-truth ratings. WellCare Essential does not appear anywhere in the ground-truth dataset, so it cannot be mapped to a rating. EliteTravel Premium Plan is listed under mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance with a rating of 5. Therefore, only EliteTravel Premium Plan can be mapped to a rating; WellCare Essential has no corresponding rating in the provided ground-truth.
